label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 18

extraction.one_line_summary: LOPEZ Miguel Angel attacked solo from reduced GC group on final climb Gamonitero, gaining 46 seconds on podium rivals while ROGLIC marked BERNAL.
tactical_patterns: STORER attacked 70km out on penultimate climb, forcing rivals to waste energy before folding on final ascent.
DE LA CRUZ attacked from peloton after MICA paced him, specifically targeting top-10 GC jump from 13th position.
BERNAL attacked first on Gamonitero forcing ROGLIC to reveal he'd only mark INEOS, allowing LOPEZ freedom to escape.
Bahrain Victorious missed 32-rider break entirely, forced to chase alone revealing poor team coordination on queen stage.

rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: First to exploit ROGLIC's selective marking strategy, gaining 46s on podium rivals HAIG/BERNAL after they chased back
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: Only marked BERNAL specifically, ignored LOPEZ attack showing confident 2:30 lead management but risky podium calculus
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Attacked but immediately covered by ROGLIC, failed to create separation showing declining climbing form late-Vuelta
rider_signals.STORER Michael: negative: 70km breakaway for KOM points collapsed on final climb, revealing insufficient depth for sustained efforts
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: positive: Used MICA as domestique then attacked from peloton to bridge, gained nearly minute for GC jump
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: negative: Lost time to LOPEZ/ROGLIC/MAS despite being on podium, showing vulnerability on steepest gradients
